name: Cisco Secure Access
description: Cisco Secure Access API actions for Splunk SOAR.

base_url.description: Cisco Secure Access API base URL (default: https://api.sse.cisco.com)

auth_header_name.description: HTTP header name for the Bearer token (value is always sent as 'Bearer {token}'; default: Authorization)

default_destination_list_id.description: Default destination list ID to use for automated domain/URL blocking

actions.description: Validate the asset configuration for connectivity
List registered network devices in the organization (deployments network devices / IOA platforms).
Remove a network device by origin ID.

origin_id.description: The origin ID of the network device to remove (path parameter from List Managed Devices).

actions.description: Get a network device by origin ID.

origin_id.description: The origin ID of the network device (path parameter from List Managed Devices).

actions.description: List all Sites in the organization (fetches all pages).

Create Destination List (optional initial destinations, up to 500 per request). POST policies/v2/destinationlists. Requires policies.destinationLists:write. isGlobal is always false (no global lists on create); bundleTypeId is always 2.

access.description: Access classification: allow, block, url_proxy, no_decrypt, warn, none, thirdparty_block.

destinations_json.description: Optional JSON array of up to 500 destinations: {"destination","type":"domain|url|ipv4","comment"?}.

actions.description: Add to Destination List (one destination and optional comment per run).

destination_list_id.description: Destination List ID. If not provided, the default destination list ID will be used.

destination.description: Destination URL, domain, or IP address

destination_list_id.description: The ID of the Destination List to remove destinations from. If not provided, the default destination list ID will be used.

profile_name.description: The profile name to terminate the VPN session for.

region.description: The region to terminate the VPN session for.

sessions.description: The sessions to terminate the VPN session for.

usernames.description: The usernames to terminate the VPN session for.

type.description: The type of identities to list.

actions.description: Update Identities (devices or security group tags).

type.description: Identity type: 'device' for identity endpoints, 'securityGroupTag' for SGTs.

identities_json.description: JSON array of identity objects (1-250). Devices: {"key","label","status","authName"}. SGTs: {"key","label","status","tagId"}. status: "active"|"inactive".

device_id.description: The ID of the user device.

user_id.description: The ID of the user (ZTNA). Get all device certificates for this user.

device_id.description: The ID of the user device. Revokes active certificates and removes the device.

actions.description: Get Roaming Computer (posture/security status for a device).

device_id.description: The device ID (deviceId) of the roaming computer, e.g. AB00C7DCEC99D211.

origin_ids.description: Comma-separated origin IDs of devices (1-100) to list SWG override settings for.

value.description: Enable (1) or disable (0) Secure Web Gateway for the devices.

origin_ids.description: Comma-separated origin IDs of devices (1-100). Devices must be registered as roaming computers.
Comma-separated origin IDs of devices (1-100) to remove SWG override setting from. Organization SWG setting will apply after removal.

actions.description: List Network Tunnel Groups in the organization.

offset.description: Index to start reading the collection (0-based). Default 0.

limit.description: Number of records per page (1-200). Default 10.

filters.description: Optional JSON object to filter by name, exactName, region, networkTunnelGroupIds, exactAuthIdPrefix, status, or duplicateCIDRs. See API docs.

sort_by.description: Sort field: name, status, createdAt, modifiedAt.

include_statuses.description: Include tunnelsStatus for each hub (max 10 tunnel states per hub).

actions.description: Get a Network Tunnel Group by ID.

id.description: The ID of the Network Tunnel Group.

actions.description: Create an access rule on the organization's Access policy.

rule_name.description: Rule name (2-50 alphanumeric, hyphen, underscore, space). Unique across access rules.

rule_priority.description: Optional priority (positive integer, unique across rules).

rule_is_enabled.description: Whether the rule is enabled. Default true.

actions.description: List access rules in the organization's Access policy.

offset.description: Index to start reading the collection (0-based). Default 0.

limit.description: Number of rules per page. Max 1000. Default 10.

rule_name.description: Filter by rule name or substring (e.g. 'Allow all rule').

filters.description: Optional JSON object to filter rules by properties (ruleName, ruleDescription, ruleIsEnabled, ruleAction, ruleConditions, sources, destinations, etc.). Cannot combine ruleConditions with sources/destinations.

actions.description: List Resource Connectors for the organization.

offset.description: Index to start reading the collection (0-based). Default 0.

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return. Default 10.

filters.description: Optional JSON object to filter by groupId, instanceId, status, confirmed, hasSynced, hasLatestVersion. See API docs.

sort_by.description: Sort field: instanceId, originIpAddress, createdAt, modifiedAt.

actions.description: Rotate the Cisco-managed S3 bucket key for the organization.
